name: Verify Profile interactions and log out
description: Starts from an authorized state, opens Profile, verifies visible Profile actions, safely cancels destructive account deletion, and logs out.
descriptionHtml: Starts from an authorized state, opens Profile, verifies visible Profile actions, safely cancels destructive account deletion, and logs out.
